items.title: OneNexus Announces Partnership with Travelers to Deliver Enhanced Surety Solutions for the Energy Sector
items.description: HOUSTON, January 05, 2026--OneNexus, a financial technology and insurance platform dedicated to funding long-duration decommissioning liabilities, today announced a strategic partnership with The Travelers Companies, Inc. ("Travelers"), the largest surety provider in North America, to deliver a new surety program purpose-built for the energy sector. Through this partnership, Travelers, a Treasury-listed surety company, will provide surety bonds backed by a long-term funding platform developed by

items.title: Definity completes purchase of Travelers’ Canadian insurance businesses
items.description: Definity said the deal makes it one of Canada’s top five P&C insurers, with combined annual premiums of around C$6bn ($4.36bn).
